# DualStream

Launching today

## Simultaneous desktop and mobile streaming, the easy way.

5.0•1 review•

177 followers

## Simultaneous desktop and mobile streaming, the easy way.

5.0•1 review•

177 followers

Visit website

Live streaming platforms

Beautifully powerful streaming. Astonishingly easy. DualStream brings Desktop and Mobile audiences your content at the same time, from a single patent-pending engine. DualStream Relay carries your broadcast to every platform from our servers — and if your connection blinks, disconnection protection keeps your stream alive. Native Alerts, Per-Source audio control, VTuber support, instant replay clips, cinema grade effects, pop-out multi-platform chat and so much more is all built in. [...] DualStream is one studio that streams to your Desktop and Mobile audiences at the same time - same sources, arranged for each scene, live everywhere in one click. The DualStream Relay - one upload from your PC, live on every platform from our servers. And if your connection drops mid-broadcast, Relay keeps every platform live on your standby screen and picks back up the moment you reconnect. Native Alerts, Per-Source audio control, VTuber support, instant replay clips (horizontal and vertical), cinema grade effects, pop-out multi-platform chat and so much more is all built in. [...] Report

Semiha

honestly this looks really solid, the simultaneous desktop and mobile push is a great angle. one thing i'd love to see is built in collaborative moderation for chats across all linked platforms, basically a shared mod queue so my team can handle trolls without jumping between five tabs. would make running a bigger stream way less chaotic

Report

MDavid Low

DualStream

DualStream

Maker

@semihajmuo I'm actually in the middle of designing collab/shared control for mods, its been a goalpost feature for a while and now with the core systems in place, it's on the nearer term roadmap :) Appreciate the note!

Report

# DualStreamAlternatives

Looking beyond DualStream? Creators love Restream for pushing to YouTube, LinkedIn, X and 30+ channels, and StreamYard for pro layouts and easy guest management. For 24/7 loops, Gyre streams pre-recorded content nonstop, while Flutin 2.0 adds flexible Free-flow Studio. Gaming-focused? Grow on Twitch.

results.title: Restream: Live stream on YouTube, LinkedIn, X and 30+ other | Product Hunt
results.content:
4.9

Based on 10 reviews

Review Restream?

Reviewers describe Restream as a reliable, easy-to-use live streaming tool that fits both simple shows and demanding production workflows. The most repeated praise is quick setup, solid stream quality, and the ability to go live across multiple platforms without much hassle. Several users also highlight Restream Studio for guest layouts, on-screen comments, and handling live demos or Q&As with limited prep. Another common theme is repurposing: users value clips generated from recordings and short-form sharing that extends reach after the live event.
